title: Create backend FastAPI app, health endpoint, and configuration loader
description: Create backend project structure with FastAPI app factory, typed settings, health endpoint, and dependency manifest. Use environment-driven settings with safe local defaults for foundation APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Runtime configuration: Configuration loads in development; Optional services are not configured. Web workbench: Backend availability is visible.
review_initial_requirements: Verify FastAPI app starts; verify /api/health returns availability and settings summary without secrets; verify env settings load from .env or defaults.
review_regression_requirements: Ensure no secrets are hard-coded; ensure backend startup does not require LLM or LibreOffice for foundation stage.
notes: from_task:1.1; validation:uv run python health route import passed; commit:pending

title: Implement local metadata repository and file storage service
description: Implement generated-id file storage under FILE_STORAGE_ROOT and JSON metadata repository for files and jobs, including sha256 computation and safe path handling.
acceptance_criteria: File storage: Configurable local storage root; File metadata retrieval. Runtime configuration: Environment-driven configuration.
review_initial_requirements: Verify uploaded originals are stored under generated IDs; verify metadata includes filename, MIME type, size, sha256, storage path, timestamp.
review_regression_requirements: Ensure user filenames are never used as storage paths; ensure metadata survives process restart via JSON store.
notes: from_task:1.2; validation:uv run python storage self-check passed; commit:pending

title: Implement Word upload and metadata APIs
description: Add backend endpoints for uploading .doc/.docx files and retrieving metadata by file_id with validation and not-found behavior.
acceptance_criteria: File storage: Upload DOCX file; Upload legacy DOC file; Reject unsupported upload; Retrieve existing file metadata; Retrieve missing file metadata.
test_mcp: backend pytest API upload tests; manual upload docx/doc
review_initial_requirements: Verify .doc and .docx uploads return file_id and metadata; verify unsupported file rejects without metadata; verify GET metadata works.
review_regression_requirements: Ensure upload errors do not leave successful metadata records; ensure API response shape remains stable for frontend.
notes: from_task:1.3; validation:uv run python file API self-check passed; commit:pending

title: Implement placeholder format jobs and worker lifecycle
description: Add job creation/status APIs and a placeholder worker that transitions queued jobs through running to completed or failed.
acceptance_criteria: Job orchestration: Create job for uploaded file; Create job for missing file; Job is queued; Job is processed; Job fails; Retrieve existing job; Retrieve missing job.
test_mcp: backend pytest job API and worker tests; manual create job and run worker
review_initial_requirements: Verify jobs are created only for existing files; verify status retrieval; verify worker transitions lifecycle and records errors.
review_regression_requirements: Ensure HTTP job creation does not synchronously block on processing; ensure failed jobs preserve human-readable error_message.
notes: from_task:1.4; validation:uv run python job API and worker self-check passed; commit:pending

title: Create React TypeScript frontend shell and API client
description: Create Vite React TypeScript app with API client, workbench shell navigation, and entry points for upload, profiles, tasks, quality reports, and outputs.
acceptance_criteria: Web workbench: User opens the workbench.
review_initial_requirements: Verify app renders workbench navigation and product areas; verify API base URL can be configured.
review_regression_requirements: Ensure no marketing landing page replaces the usable workbench; ensure TypeScript build passes.
notes: from_task:2.1; validation:npm run build passed; commit:pending

title: Implement backend health and Word upload UI
description: Add health status display and upload form that sends .doc/.docx files to the backend and shows returned file metadata or validation errors.
acceptance_criteria: Web workbench: Backend availability is visible; Backend is unavailable; Upload entry point; User uploads supported Word file; User selects unsupported file type.
test_mcp: frontend npm build; manual health and upload flow
review_initial_requirements: Verify health state handles available/unavailable backend; verify supported upload displays metadata; verify unsupported upload displays error.
review_regression_requirements: Ensure frontend does not create a job after failed upload; ensure upload UI remains usable on small desktop viewport.
notes: from_task:2.2; validation:npm run build passed; backend CORS config self-check passed; commit:pending

title: Implement placeholder job creation and task status UI
description: Add UI actions to create a placeholder format job for the uploaded file and display/re-fetch job lifecycle status.
acceptance_criteria: Web workbench: Task status visibility; Job is created; Job status changes. Job orchestration: Placeholder format job creation; Job status retrieval.
test_mcp: frontend npm build; manual create job and refresh status
review_initial_requirements: Verify job creation displays job_id and state; verify status refresh shows backend lifecycle state.
review_regression_requirements: Ensure missing file cannot create job from UI; ensure failed job errors are visible.

title: Add env example, git ignores, and local startup documentation
description: Add .env.example with required comments, ignore runtime artifacts, and document backend/frontend/worker startup plus verification commands.
acceptance_criteria: Runtime configuration: Example environment file; Secrets are excluded; Local startup documentation; Developer follows startup docs.
test_mcp: manual docs review; git status check
review_initial_requirements: Verify .env.example lists DATABASE_URL, REDIS_URL, FILE_STORAGE_ROOT, LLM_API_KEY, LLM_MODEL, SOFFICE_BIN with purpose/source/required comments.
review_regression_requirements: Ensure .env and storage artifacts are ignored; ensure docs do not instruct sudo pip or hard-code secrets.

title: Add backend tests and frontend build verification
description: Add tests and verification coverage for config, health, upload, metadata, job lifecycle, and frontend build.
acceptance_criteria: Runtime configuration: Developer runs verification commands. All foundation API and workbench scenarios have automated or documented manual validation.
test_mcp: backend pytest; frontend npm build; openspec validate add-web-platform-foundation --strict --no-interactive
review_initial_requirements: Verify backend tests cover config, upload validation, metadata retrieval, job creation/status, and worker transitions; verify frontend build passes.
review_regression_requirements: Ensure OpenSpec validate remains passing; ensure generated storage/test artifacts are not committed.
